notes: UI visual layout is not redesigned.
Comments open state is resolved once from Postgres before client paint.
Old comments repaint/observer layers are not loaded by the CC7 entrypoint.
Post title is taken from ak_posts raw/text/title by resolved commentKey/postId.
First chip stays static: Начало обсуждения. Second chip is dynamic: АдминКИТ or configured client CTA.
